description: Cenit IO is an integration platform (iPaaS) for connecting cloud and on-premise services and orchestrating data flows. Its Edge Connector product provides a unified API for business-service integrations such as ecommerce and marketplace connections.
summary: cenit-io.github.io publishes two developer-facing HTTP APIs: the Cenit IO REST API and the Edge Connector API, both documented with public API references; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on this domain.
